description: You are a GIS analyst needing to define a study area. Using the reference data at /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp, create a new polygon shapefile at /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/iceland_boundary.shp. Digitize a boundary enclosing the island of Iceland in the North Atlantic. The shapefile must contain a string field named 'region_id' (length 20) with the attribute value 'ISL-Zone-01' for the digitized feature.
